sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64416" key="magei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰγεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (μάσσὠ</foreign> <sense id="n64416.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐκμαγεῖον</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
